title: Midnight social media curfew and limits to infinite scrolling proposed for older UK teens
summary: The U.K. government has proposed new measures to protect older teens on social media, including a midnight curfew and a limit to infinite scrolling.

title: ASML rises 3% after hiking sales forecast for second time this year on strong AI chip demand
summary: ASML on Wednesday raised its guidance for a second time this year as its customers continue to ramp up their production capacity of AI chips.

title: Why Europe is suddenly betting big on drones
summary: Drones and autonomous systems are moving from niche battlefield tools to a core part of modern warfare.

title: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 8% as Asia tech stocks rally
summary: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.
